name: Famous Hot Brown
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/3 cup butter in a saucepan and add onion. Cook until transparent.
2. Add flour and blend until smooth. Add milk, salt, and red pepper. Stir and cook until the mixture is thick and smooth. Stir in cheese, eggs, and 1 tablespoon butter. Continue to cook, stirring until the mixture almost reaches boiling. Remove sauce from heat.
3. Fry bacon slices until crisp.
4. Assemble hot browns:
a. Toast 8 slices of wheat bread.
b. Cut 4 slices diagonally.
c. On 4 oven-proof plates, place cut toast with points turned outward, with one whole slice in the middle. Layer chicken, sauce, and bacon.
d. Sprinkle generously with Parmesan and paprika.
e. Broil 2 to 3 minutes.
Note: Turkey may be substituted for chicken.
